title: 2-in-1 Metabolite and Protein Extraction Method for Plant Multi-Omics
author: Qijie Guan
materials: Savant SPD1010 SpeedVac Concentrator System (Thermo Scientific)
Metabolite extraction buffer I (acetonitrile: isopropanol: water, 3:3:2)
1 µg/µL Bovine Serum Albumin Fraction V (BSA)
Protein Lysis solubilization solution (7 M urea, 2 M thiourea, 4% CHAPS, 10 mM DTT and 0.1 mM PMSF)
Vacuum drying samples with Savant SPD1010 SpeedVac Concentrator System (Thermo Scientific, Asheville, NC, USA). Savant SPD1010 SpeedVac Concentrator System (Savant, SPD1010)

steps.title: Collect plant material and prepare for freezing
steps.instruction: Sample collection Collect plant material using a humidity chamber, weigh 150 mg for each 2 mL screw cap tube (Cole-Parmer, Vernon Hills, IL, USA), add a 6 mm stainless steel grinding ball (Cole-Parmer, Vernon Hills, IL, USA). Put tubes in liquid nitrogen immediately. Liquid nitrogen is extremely cold and can be hazardous if not handled properly.

steps.title: Homogenize samples
steps.instruction: For each tube, add a 6 mm stainless steel grinding ball (Cole-Parmer, Vernon Hil ls, IL, USA). Freeze the tube with liquid nitrogen, homogenize with homogenizer (HG-400, Cole-Parmer, Vernon Hills, IL, USA) for 1000 rpm, °C, 2 minutes . Add liquid nitrogen to the clamp to remain tubes cold. Cole-Parmer SamplePrep HG-400 MiniG® Homogenizer (homogenizer, Cole-Parmer, EW-04500-08, https://www.coleparmer.com/i/cole-parmer-sampleprep-hg-400-minig-homogenizer-2-to-50-ml-115-230-vac-50-60hz/0450008 )

steps.title: Metabolite extraction with buffer I
steps.instruction: Add 800 µL pre-cooled (-20 °C) metabolite extraction buffer I (acetonitrile: isopropanol: water, 3:3:2) with 0.1 mM PMSF to the tube. Remove the bead in the tube with magnetic sticker. Vortex 30 seconds, sonicate in ice water for 5 min, centrifuge 15000 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes . Phenylmethylsulfonyl fluoride (PMSF) is a serine protease inhibitor. It is highly reactive and hazardous, requiring careful handling. Use Gloves, Eye protection, Lab coat, and Respirator.

steps.title: Add internal standards
steps.instruction: Add internal standards For each sample tube, add 3 internal standards: 10 µL of 100 µM lidocaine (metabolomics, positive mode) 10 µL of 100 µM 10-camphorsulfonic acid (10-CA, metabolomics, negative mode) 4 µL of 1 µg/µL Bovine Serum Albumin Fraction V (BSA, proteomics)

steps.title: Collect supernatant A
steps.instruction: Pipetting supernatant to a new 1.5 mL centrifuge tube A. The 1.5 mL supernatant tube A should be kept in a -20 °C freezer.

steps.title: Metabolite extraction with buffer II
steps.instruction: Add 800 µL pre-cooled (-20 °C) metabolite extraction buffer II (acetonitrile: water, 1:1) with 0.1 mM PMSF to the pellet. Vortex 30 seconds, sonicate in ice water for 5 min, centrifuge 15000 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes . Phenylmethylsulfonyl fluoride (PMSF) is a serine protease inhibitor. It is highly reactive and hazardous, requiring careful handling. Use Gloves, Eye protection, Lab coat, and Respirator.

steps.title: Collect supernatant B
steps.instruction: Pipetting supernatant to a new 1.5 mL centrifuge tube B. The 1.5 mL supernatant tube B should be kept in a -20 °C freezer.

steps.title: Metabolite extraction with buffer III
steps.instruction: Add 800 µL pre-cooled (-20 °C) metabolite extraction buffer III (80% methanol) with 0.1 mM PMSF to the pellet. Vortex 30 seconds, sonicate in ice water for 5 min, centrifuge 15000 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes . Phenylmethylsulfonyl fluoride (PMSF) is a serine protease inhibitor. It is highly reactive and hazardous, requiring careful handling. Use Gloves, Eye protection, Lab coat, and Respirator.

steps.title: Collect supernatant C
steps.instruction: Pipetting supernatant to a new 1.5 mL centrifuge tube C. The remaining residue will be used in protein extraction (step 13)

steps.title: Combine and vacuum dry metabolite extracts
steps.instruction: Vacuum dry the three collected tubes, combine extracts from the same sample together after 1 h of vacuum drying. Pipet the sample in B, C tubes to A tube, so that all metabolites will be transferred and combined in one tube for drying down.

steps.title: Vacuum dry metabolite residue
steps.instruction: Vacuum dry metabolite extraction residue (from step 10) for 5 min to evaporate methanol remaining.

steps.title: Add protein lysis solubilization solution
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL protei n Lysis solubilization solution (7 M urea, 2 M thiourea, 4% CHAPS, 10 mM DTT and 0.1 mM PMSF). Phenylmethylsulfonyl fluoride (PMSF) is a serine protease inhibitor. It is highly reactive and hazardous, requiring careful handling. Use Gloves, Eye protection, Lab coat, and Respirator.

steps.title: Process protein sample
steps.instruction: Vortex in cold room (4 °C) for 30 min, sonicate in ice water for 5 min, centrifuge 15000 x g, 4 °C, 15 minutes .

steps.title: Collect protein solvent
steps.instruction: Collect the supernatant, this is the protein solvent.

steps.title: Final metabolite section
steps.instruction: Once dried down, the residue is the metabolite section.
